title: Savory Umami Indian Lamb Naan
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian dish featuring tender lamb and crispy naan bread, perfect for adventurous eaters looking for a low-glycemic-friendly meal option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large Dutch oven, heat the ghee over medium heat.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the lamb to the pot and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Warm the naan bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for 5 minutes.
Assemble the dish by placing a piece of naan bread on a plate, topping it with the lamb mixture, and serving immediately.
